name: Obelisk
description: Context firewall tools for OpenClaw agents: compact command output, pack context, inspect symbols, restore handles, and report token savings.

obeliskBinary.description: Path to the Obelisk binary. Defaults to `obelisk` on PATH.

allowRunTool.description: Allow obelisk_run. This is still guarded by the plugin's read-only command policy and a before_tool_call approval hook.
